stories: Good morning Sean, it's Monday the fourth of May, 2026
Today is Star Wars Day, the date fans around the world have claimed as a celebration of the galaxy far, far away
But here's a lesser-known historical twist: on this exact date in 1910, Canada officially established its own Royal Navy
Before that, Canadians relied entirely on the British fleet
Sometimes the greatest empires are built one fleet at a time

SINGAPORE

Singapore is doing some active relationship work this week
Meanwhile, Senior Minister Lee Hsien Loong departs today for a five-day visit to Malaysia's Pahang and Terengganu states, deepening cross-border ties at the regional level
Practical update closer to home: services on the Thomson-East Coast Line are back to normal after a signalling fault caused disruptions yesterday morning
Good evening Sean, it's Sunday evening, the third of May, 2026
Here's a quick opener for you: on this day in 1978, the very first spam email was sent â 393 addresses, advertising a new computer
The internet was barely walking, and someone had already figured out how to be annoying

Tomorrow's Calendar

Monday looks reasonably structured
Worth deciding in advance which one needs you most

Singapore

The biggest story from Singapore this week is PM Lawrence Wong's May Day Rally speech on Friday
He was candid about what's coming â the Iran crisis and US blockades on Iranian ports are already slowing growth and pushing inflation higher
But the headline pledge was clear: Singapore will protect every worker, even if it can't protect every job
